who: solo practitioners in law firms processing 5–15 case files/month
offer: For solo practitioners in law firms processing 5–15 case files/month, inefficient conversion causes delays in court submissions. We automate the conversion instead of manual conversion of case files.
problem: Inefficient conversion of legal case files into electronic formats.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for legal practitioners
Indie Hackers posts about legal workflows
DM outreach to solo practitioners with demo video
Community forums for legal tech discussions
try_it: Let users try basic format conversion on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
